description: An Australian Government agency's AI transparency statement, as tracked by the APS AI Tracker (https://anucybernetics.github.io/aps-ai-tracker/). One record per agency, updated in place as the agency revises its statement; the change history lives in the companion me.benswift.transparencyStatementRevision records.

main.description: The current state of one agency's AI transparency statement. The record key is the tracker's agency abbreviation (e.g. ABS, ACCC), matching the tracker's /statements/{abbr} page.

abbr.description: The tracker's abbreviation for the agency (also this record's key).

sourceUrl.description: Canonical URL of the statement on the agency's own website.

document.description: AT-URI of the site.standard.document carrying the statement's current full text.

firstObservedAt.description: When the tracker first captured this statement (not when the agency first published it).

lastChangedAt.description: When the tracker last observed a substantive change (scrape noise excluded).

contentHash.description: sha256 (hex) of the statement's current markdown body.

revisionCount.description: Number of revisions the tracker has recorded, including the initial capture.
